meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement user onboarding to mitigate issues caused by lack of version control. A Beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Without version control, a single mistake destroys your progress. By implementing robust user onboarding, you create a structured path that guides users through your app's state, minimizing erratic inputs that lead to broken code. Use Claude Code to automate this flow, ensuring your application remains resilient even without complex Git history.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen of code that worked ten minutes ago, but now refuses to compile. You didn’t commit, you didn’t branch, and the 'Undo' button has failed you. This is the cold reality of development without version control—the moment where most students walk away from their dreams.

But there is a bridge across this chaos. By treating your user onboarding as a defensive layer, you can control the environment your app lives in, shielding it from the unpredictability of unmanaged development. We aren't just building a sign-up flow; we are building a safeguard for your architecture.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Establish a clear path for users to ensure they interact with your app in a predictable sequence, preventing edge-case crashes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine schema for a user onboarding flow that forces sequential data entry to prevent application state corruption.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize onboarding state machine based on the Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Input Validation
steps.description: Sanitize all user inputs early to prevent malformed data from breaking your un-versioned codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust validation middleware that checks every user input against strict type definitions before updating the app state.

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Milestones
steps.description: Use progress tracking to ensure users only trigger app features once previous steps are verified as successful.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a progress-tracking component that locks core functionality until the onboarding flow is completed.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Inject progress-tracking logic into the main app component'

steps.title: Build a Recovery Modal
steps.description: Create a UI safety net that resets the user state if an error is detected, effectively 'hard-resetting' the local session.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a recovery modal component that clears local storage and re-initiates the onboarding sequence upon detecting a runtime error.

steps.title: Integrate Claude Code for Automated Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to run simulated user journeys, ensuring your onboarding flow remains stable as you iterate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test script that simulates a full user onboarding journey and checks for state consistency.

pro_tips: Treat your browser's LocalStorage as a temporary database and clear it frequently to simulate a fresh start.
Use feature flags to toggle experimental code; it acts as a 'poor man's version control' while you build.
Document your logic in a simple README file; if you can't explain the code in plain English, you shouldn't be writing it yet.
Always build for the 'happy path' first, but hard-code your error handling to trigger a full page reload.
Snapshot your code by copying it into a separate 'archive' folder every time you reach a functional milestone.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, start modularizing your code into individual components to prepare for a migration to Git.
content.conversion_block: Your journey from student to engineer is paved with the projects you survive. Stop fearing the blank screen and start architecting your success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
